The '''Calamarian minisub''' was a small [[Submarine/Legends|submarine]] used on the [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dac/Legends|Calamari]].<ref name="Glove of Darth Vader" /> In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="Date note">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'', which includes the appearance of the Calamarian [[minisub]], to [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].</ref> [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] used a [[Fish/Legends|fish]]-shaped Calamarian [[minisub]] to track and [[Spy/Legends|spy]] upon a [[Whaladon-hunting submarine]].<ref name="Glove of Darth Vader" />

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Calamarian minisub first appeared in the [[1992]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel ''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'', which was written by [[Paul Davids]] and [[Hollace Davids]], with illustrations by [[Karl Kesel]].<ref name="Glove of Darth Vader" /> In the current ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]], a similar [[Unidentified Quarren submarine|submarine]] appeared in the [[2018]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Darth Vader (2017) 15|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 15]].<ref name="Darth Vader 15">[[Darth Vader (2017) 15|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 15]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'' {{1st}}
